assignments.description: Updates Quote's Revenue Total Variables with the all the Revenue values from the Quote Lines.
assignments.name: Add_Quote_Line_Values_to_Totals
assignments.label: Add Quote Line Values to Totals

assignments.description: Set Quote Revenue Total Variables to 0 for Initial run.
assignments.name: Initialize_Totals
assignments.label: Initialize Totals

assignments.description: Sets the errorMessage variable to the fault message from InvokePlaceSalesTransaction invocable action.
assignments.name: SetErrorMessage
assignments.label: Set Error Message

assignments.description: Sets the errorMessage variable to the flow’s fault message and the isSuccess variable to false.
assignments.name: SetErrorVariables
assignments.label: Set Error Variables

assignments.description: Sets the fields and their values for the placeSalesTransactionGraph variable.
assignments.name: SetPlaceSalesTransactionGraphFields
assignments.label: Set Place Sales Transaction Graph Fields

assignments.description: Sets the values provided in the input to the quote fields in the quoteRecordReference variable.
assignments.name: SetQuoteFieldsAndValues
assignments.label: Set Quote Fields and Values

assignments.description: Sets the fields and their values for the quoteRecordReference variable.
assignments.name: SetQuoteRecordReferenceFields
assignments.label: Set Quote Record Reference Fields

decisions.description: Determines whether the quote fields are updated with the inputs passed into the flow.
decisions.name: IsQuoteUpdated
decisions.label: Is Quote Updated?

Flow.description: Updates the Quote's Revenue fields such as ARR, MRR, etc after the Quote Lines have been created.

formulas.description: Calculates Quote One Time Total by adding all Quote Line One Time Amounts together.
formulas.name: frmOneTimeTotal

formulas.description: Calculates Quote Recurring Total by adding all Quote Line Recurring Amounts together.
formulas.name: frmRecurringTotal

formulas.description: Calculates Quote Total ARR by adding all Quote Line ARRs together.
formulas.name: frmTotalARR

formulas.description: Calculates Quote Total Delta ARR by adding all Quote Line Delta ARRs together.
formulas.name: frmTotalDeltaARR

formulas.description: Calculates Quote Total MRR by adding all Quote Line MRRs together.
formulas.name: frmTotalMRR

formulas.description: Calculates Quote Total Renewal ARR by adding all Quote Line Renewal ARRs together.
formulas.name: frmTotalRenewalARR

Flow.interviewLabel: Update Quote Details - Techvera Revenue Rollups {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Update Quote Details - Techvera Revenue Rollups

loops.description: Repeats actions for each error record in Error Response from GetErrorResponse record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverErrors
loops.label: Iterate Over Errors

loops.description: Repeats actions for each input field value for a quote record in Input Field Values from InputFieldValues record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverInputFieldValues
loops.label: Iterate Over Input Field Values

loops.description: Collect all the related Quote Lines for Revenue Totals calculations.
loops.name: Loop_Through_Quote_Lines
loops.label: Loop Through Quote Lines

variables.description: Stores the error message that occurs when InvokePlaceSalesTransaction fails and is available as output from the flow.
variables.name: errorMessage

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex error records after InvokePlaceSalesTransaction
variables.name: errorResponses

variables.description: Stores an Apex object that contains the details of the quote field to update and is passed into the flow.
variables.name: inputFieldValue

variables.description: Stores a collection of Apex objects containing details of the quote fields to be updated and is passed into the flow.
variables.name: inputFieldValues

variables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether InvokePlaceSalesTransaction succeeded.
variables.name: isSuccess

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote One Time Total modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: oneTimeTotalRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores values for the Graph Apex-defined type that’s used as an input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: placeSalesTransactionGraph

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Auto Renew modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: quoteAutoRenewRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Contains Partner Subscriptions modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: quoteContainsPartnerSubscriptionsRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Hardware Order modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: quoteHardwareOrderRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the ID of the quote passed into the flow.
variables.name: quoteId

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Next Renewal Date modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: quoteNextRenewalDateRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: quoteRecordReference

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Renewal Date modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: quoteRenewalDateRecordMapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Recurring Total modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: recurringTotalRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Total ARR modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: totalARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Total Delta ARR modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: totalDeltaARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Total MRR modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: totalMRRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Total Renewal ARR modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: totalRenewalARRRecordMapWrapper

variables.description: Stores the record reference for the quote Total Up For Renewal ARR modified by this flow. This variable is used to construct the Graph Apex-defined type input for the InvokePlaceSalesTransaction action.
variables.name: totalUpForRenewalARRRecordMapWrapper
